summary: Iteration 23: Equipment tab parity testing - Verified Equipment tab now matches Armor/Weapons layout with 3-column card grid, large image headers (h-52), type/subtype badges as overlays, amber price, 'Where to find' expandable with Buy/Loot sections, and detail modal with variant buttons. Backend 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend all tests passed.

issues: Most equipment items show Package placeholder icon since CStone doesn't have images for mining equipment. This is expected per main agent note.

critical_code_review_comments: EquipmentCard correctly rewritten from horizontal list to vertical card layout matching ArmorCard
Equipment grid changed from 'space-y-3' to 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4' - correct
GearDetailModal treats all three types (weapon/armor/equipment) uniformly with variant buttons
gear.py equipment endpoint passes loot_locations field to frontend
Frontend correctly handles missing CStone images with Package placeholder icon
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - Equipment data from personal_gear.py, images from CStone API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 verified Equipment tab parity with Armor/Weapons. All three gear tabs now have: 1) 3-column card grid layout, 2) Large image headers with type/subtype badges as overlays, 3) Variant selector dropdowns on cards, 4) Price in amber, 5) 'Where to find' expandable sections with Buy and Loot/Farm subsections, 6) Detail modal with clickable variant buttons that preview images. Equipment types: Mining Head, Mining Attachment, Mining Module, Medical Device, Undersuit, Salvage Tool, Scanner, Hacking Tool. Most equipment items show Package placeholder since CStone doesn't have mining equipment images.
